logs.message: Sqloom.AzureSql does not provide an inclusive lower bound for dependency Microsoft.Data.SqlClient. Microsoft.Data.SqlClient 1.0.19239.1 was resolved instead.
Sqloom.AspNetCore does not provide an inclusive lower bound for dependency Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer. Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer 1.0.0 was resolved instead.
